Package com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.connector

Class UserManagement

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.connector.UserManagement
public final class UserManagement extends Object
The UserManagement provides methods to search for, create, update and delete users, groups and tenants. To use the UserManagement, the saperion.properties of the Java Core Server must include the line rmi.userservice.enabled=true.

To create a new instance, use

UserManagement userManagement = new UserManagement.Config(connector).build();

where connector is an initialized and logged-on instance of the SaClassicConnector.

      TypedFinder used to define search conditions

      public <Type extends com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.UserManagementItem> Type create(Class<Type> type, Type item) throws AuthenticationException, BackendException

    • changePassword

      public void changePassword(int id, String oldPassword, String newPassword) throws AuthenticationException, BackendException
      Changes the user's password.
      Parameters:
      oldPassword -
      newPassword -
      Throws:
      AuthenticationException
      BackendException

    • setPassword

      @Privileged public void setPassword(int userId, String newPassword) throws AuthenticationException, BackendException
      Sets a new password to the user with the given userId. Administrative rights required.
      Parameters:
      userId - the id of the user to change the password of. Must be greater than zero.
      newPassword - the new password of the user. May not be null or empty.
      Throws:
      AuthenticationException
      BackendException

    • generate

      public com.saperion.jcs.modules.authentication.api.AccessToken<String> generate(long expires, TimeUnit unit, Collection<String> additionalOptions) throws AuthenticationException, BackendException
      Generates an AccessToken which can be used with the help of the UsernameAccessTokenKey to login into SAPERION.
      Parameters:
      expires - count of seconds if unit == TimeUnit.SECONDS
      unit - TimeUnit
      additionalOptions - Values which will be encoded into the token, which must be passed with the login
      Returns:
      token A valid Token for your Session
      Throws:
      RemoteException
      AuthenticationException
      BackendException

    • encrypt

      public String encrypt(String toEncrypt) throws BackendException
      Encrypt a String in the context of the server and user. Only the user which has encrypted the string is able to decrypt it again.
      Parameters:
      toEncrypt - the string which should be encrypted
      Returns:
      the encrypted string
      Throws:
      BackendException - if the string couldn't be encrypted

    • decrypt

      public String decrypt(String toDecrypt) throws BackendException
      Decrypt a String in the context of the server and user. Only the user which has encrypted the string is able to decrypt it again.
      Parameters:
      toDecrypt - the encrypted string which should be decrypted
      Returns:
      the decrypted string
      Throws:
      BackendException - if the string couldn't be decrypted

      Set of Groups

      SearchException
